methods.name: init
methods.desc: Completes factory-only initialization with the creator-specific royalty.

methods.name: optIn

args.name: asset
args.desc: The asset to be opted into

methods.desc: optin tells the contract to opt into an asa, it may also require the akita dao escrow to opt in

methods.name: enterCost

args.name: address
args.desc: The address that will be entering

returns.desc: The entry box MBR plus any app-scoped SOFT stake MBR

methods.desc: Calculates the total cost required to enter the pool

returns.desc: a boolean of whether sign ups are open
a boolean of whether the pool is live
a boolean indicating if the address has entered the staking pool
the mbr created for each boxmap entry

status.desc: the status the pool is in

type.desc: the method of staking to be used for the pool

signupTimestamp.desc: the timestamp when sign ups for the pool are allowed

allowLateSignups.desc: whether signups are allowed after the staking pool begins

startTimestamp.desc: the timestamp when the pool starts

endTimestamp.desc: the timestamp when the pool ends

maxEntries.desc: the maximum entries allowed for the pool

entryID.desc: the number of entries in a pool

rewardID.desc: the number of rewards for the pool

stakeKey.desc:
the name for the meta merkle asset group to validate staking
stake key can be empty if distribution !== DistributionTypePercentage

gateID.desc: the gate id of the pool

creator.desc: the address of the creator of the staking pool

marketplace.desc: marketplace is pool creation side marketplace

marketplaceRoyalties.desc: the amount the marketplaces will get for the sale

akitaRoyalty.desc: the akita royalty for the pool

akitaDAOEscrow.desc: the named DAO escrow this contract routes fees to (name + app)

version.desc: the current version of the contract

akitaDAO.desc: the app ID of the Akita DAO

uniques.desc: the number of unique asset entries by address

rewards.desc: the rewards for this staking pool

disbursements.desc: the disbursements this pool as created & finalized
